aboutPage.title: Two names, one promise: fair.
aboutPage.intro: J&J Fair Automobile was founded by Javad Ayoubi and Jusuf Dyanat on the belief that buying and selling a car should be built on trust.
paragraphs: As an owner-run dealership in Mainz-Kastel, we value personal advice, transparent pricing, and carefully selected vehicles. With us, you're never just a number — we take the time for your questions and needs.
Whether you're buying or selling, our goal is that you feel well looked after every step of the way — fair, honest, and without pressure.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Open communication and honest assessments, from the very first conversation.

values.title: Quality
values.desc: We carefully select every vehicle before it leaves our lot.

values.title: Proximity
values.desc: As a small team, we're personally reachable — right here in Mainz-Kastel.

contactPage.title: Talk to us
contactPage.intro: Have a question about a vehicle, or want to sell your car? We're happy to help in person, by phone, or by email.
